name: Roll-Up Range
description: The Highfield Roll-Up range is designed for ultimate portability and ease of use. These boats feature high-tensile chromated and powder-coated aluminum floor slats or air-mats, offering a more rigid and durable alternative to traditional wood or plastic floors. Built with a choice of Mehler PVC or ORCA® Hypalon, they are lightweight enough to be easily stowed in a locker or on deck, yet rugged enough to handle daily tender duties. They can be assembled or packed away in minutes without the need for tools.
features: High tensile chromated & powder-coated aluminum floor/slats
Choice of ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Includes foot pump, oars, and repair kit

construction.material: Aluminum Slats or Air-Mat / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Roll-Up 200

name: Ultralite Range
description: The Ultralite range is specifically designed for boaters who require a rigid hull but need to keep weight to an absolute minimum. Featuring a 2.5mm thick high-tensile chromated and powder-coated aluminum hull, these single-deck RIBs offer a dry and stable ride without the weight penalty of fiberglass or double-deck designs. They are the ideal choice for smaller davits or swim platforms and are rugged enough for frequent beaching on rocky shores.
features: High tensile chromated & powder-coated aluminum hull
ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Single deck construction for minimum weight

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: UL 240
variants.description: The most compact Ultralite model, weighing only 31kg, perfect for small yacht tenders.

variants.name: UL 260
variants.description: A popular 8'6" model that offers more interior volume while staying under 35kg.

variants.name: UL 290
variants.description: A 9'6" lightweight RIB rated for up to 15HP for improved transit performance.

variants.name: UL 310
variants.description: A 10'2" model providing ample space for gear and crew with minimal weight impact.

variants.name: UL 340
variants.description: The largest Ultralite variant, offering maximum deck space while still being lighter than most fiberglass 2.4m boats.

name: Classic Range
description: The Classic range features a high-quality double-deck hull, providing a flat floor to keep your feet dry and a built-in bow locker for fuel tank storage. These boats are the perfect combination of luxury and durability, constructed with a 3mm thick high-tensile aluminum hull. Their versatile design allows them to be used as open tenders or configured with console steering for a more comfortable cruising experience.
features: Double deck hull with flat floor
Integrated bow locker (suitable for 24L fuel tank)
ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Davit lifting points and towing eyes
Optional FCT console and seat kits

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

name: Sport Range
description: The Sport range is Highfield’s high-end luxury line, combining the rugged durability of an aluminum hull with the sophisticated finishes of a premium dayboat. Featuring deep-V hulls with deadrise angles up to 26°, these RIBs offer exceptional offshore performance. The interiors are defined by diamond-stitched upholstery, EVA teak decking, and integrated social spaces like sun-decks and swim platforms. Ranging from compact 3-meter garage tenders to 9-meter offshore cruisers, the Sport series is designed for those who want both performance and comfort.
features: High tensile chromated & powder-coated aluminum hull
ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Integrated under-deck fuel tanks (on larger models)
Swim platforms with telescopic boarding ladder
Electrical pack for boat and console

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

name: Patrol Range
description: The Patrol range is the commercial-grade powerhouse of the Highfield lineup. Built with 5083 aluminum plates and heavy-duty stringers (6mm and 10mm), these boats are designed to withstand the most extreme sea states. Used by police, rescue, and charter operators, the Patrol series offers a modular deck layout that can be customized with jockey seats, bolsters, and T-tops. With their super-deep V hulls and large diameter tubes, they provide high maneuverability and a soft, dry ride even when carrying heavy loads.
features: Super deep-V hull (up to 26° deadrise) for rough water
Modular deck for customizable seating and equipment
Heavy-duty tube wear patches and rub strakes
Optional dive racks, T-tops, and suspension seating

construction.material: 5083 Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

name: Escape Range
description: The Escape series is Highfield's first all-American fiberglass-hull RIB line, designed for versatility and family day-boating. Built in the USA, these boats combine a performance-oriented deep-V fiberglass hull (26° deadrise) with the stability and safety of a RIB. The design emphasizes comfort with ergonomic helm seating, flip-up bolsters, and family-friendly layouts including sunpads and generous storage. Whether used as a primary dayboat for coastal exploration or a high-end yacht tender, the Escape series delivers a soft, dry ride with premium customization options.
features: ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Hydraulic steering system with steering wheel
Electrical pack for boat and console
Standard roll bar and cooler bag

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Escape 650
variants.description: A 23'6" center console RIB rated for up to 250HP, offering a balance of coastal performance and ergonomic comfort.

variants.name: Escape 750
variants.description: The 26'6" flagship of the Escape range, featuring a walk-in console, increased deck space, and a 300HP rating.

name: Velox Range
description: The Velox range introduces the thrill of Rotax jet propulsion to the Highfield aluminum hull platform. Designed for shallow water navigation, inland waters, and coastal adventures, these jet RIBs offer responsive handling and impressive acceleration without an exposed propeller. The rugged aluminum hull allows for worry-free beaching on sandbars, while the RIB architecture provides a stable, buoyant ride. With ergonomic forward-facing seating and integrated sunpads, the Velox series is built for both high-speed excitement and social day-boating.
features: High tensile chromated & powder-coated aluminum hull
ORCA® Hypalon or Valmex® PVC tube fabric
Anti-slip deck with brushed foam teak finish
Electrical pack for boat and console
Optional roll bar and premium audio systems

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Velox 420
variants.description: A compact 14'7" jet RIB powered by a 90HP Rotax engine, ideal for navigating narrow channels and shallow inlets.

variants.name: Velox 560
variants.description: A 19'5" jet-powered RIB offering a stable ride and performance up to 230HP for coastal adventures.

variants.name: Velox 660
variants.description: The largest Velox model at 22'11", delivering 300HP of jet performance and a 12-passenger capacity.

name: Adventure Range
description: The Adventure (ADV) range represents Highfield's evolution into the cabin crossover market, combining the offshore safety of a RIB with the year-round comfort of a fully enclosed pilot house. Built on a proven 26° deadrise high-tensile aluminum hull, these vessels are designed for long-distance exploration and multi-day voyages. The range features slide-on tubes for easier maintenance and a modular interior that includes berths, a galley, and a head. Engineered for professional-grade durability but finished with luxury amenities, the ADV series is the ultimate vessel for serious cruisers who want to extend their season into colder climates and rougher seas.
features: Slide-on tube system for easy repair or replacement
Overnight berths and social cabin seating
Integrated galley and enclosed head options
Walk-around deck design for safe access

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / PVC or Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: ADV7
variants.description: A 23-foot cabin RIB providing a compact yet capable platform for coastal exploration and overnighting.

variants.name: ADV9
variants.description: The flagship 30-foot expedition vessel featuring a twin-engine configuration, full galley, and sleeping accommodations for four.
